Package org.apache.bookkeeper.server

package org.apache.bookkeeper.server
BookKeeper Server (Bookie) related components.

This is the new relocation for any sever related classes. It is to prepare for separating common, protocol, client and server modules.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.bookkeeper.server.component
    The lifecycle components that run on a bookie server.
    org.apache.bookkeeper.server.conf
    Server component related configuration.
    org.apache.bookkeeper.server.http
    Package for bookkeeper http service.
    org.apache.bookkeeper.server.service
    Services running in a storage server (bookie).
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    EmbeddedServer
    An embedded server is a server that run bookie and serving rpc requests.
    EmbeddedServer.Builder
     
    Main
    A bookie server is a server that run bookie and serving rpc requests.
